title: Trichera fleischmannii
taxonomy: Trichera fleischmannii is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. The genus Trichera is part of the larger order Celastrales. This classification places it within the larger clade of flowering plants, specifically in the subclass Rosidae. Trichera fleischmannii is a member of the family Celastraceae, which is characterized by its distinctive flowers and fruits. The classification of Trichera fleischmannii highlights its unique position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Trichera fleischmannii is a plant species with various traditional uses, but its medicinal properties and applications are not extensively documented in scientific literature.
